specialty: General Medicine/ Pediatric medical management/ General surgery
alos: daycare (Few complicated cases of AV fistula may need hospitalization >1 day)
clinical_indications: eGFR < 30 ml/min, to preserve veins in the non-dominant arm for AV Fistula
eGFR < 15 ml/min, with anticipation of future dialysis and counselling for AV fistula
Need for vascular access for Haemodialysis

clinical_thresholds.note: for preserving veins and planning AV fistula
for anticipating dialysis and counselling for AV fistula

preauth.label: Pathological Examination (Complete Blood count, Blood urea, Serum Creatinine, GFR, serum electrolytes; monthly for chronic dialysis, quarterly for Serum Iron, ferritin, TIBC, TSAT, SGOT, SGPT, viral markers, calcium, phosphate)

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes with indications for AV Fistula?

common_queries: Clinical notes do not mention indications for AV Fistula creation
Pathological examination reports (CBC, Blood urea, Serum Creatinine, GFR, serum electrolytes) missing or incomplete
Planned line of treatment for AV fistula not documented
Discharge summary for AV fistula missing or incomplete at claim stage
eGFR not documented or not meeting the threshold for AV fistula planning

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: MD/ DNB (Medicine); DM/ DNB (Nephrology) or equivalent
additional_information.pre_op_preparation: Preserve veins in the non-dominant arm for AV Fistula when eGFR < 30 ml/min
referral_criteria: Initial evaluation of all newly diagnosed cases (CKD)
Discussion for Renal Replacement Therapy (RRT) (includes AV Fistula)
